description.value: Price +4 bonus; Aura strong transmutation; CL 16th; Weight â DESCRIPTION A brilliant energy weapon has its significant portion transformed into light, although this does not modify the item’s weight. It always gives off light as a torch (20-foot radius). A brilliant energy weapon ignores nonliving matter. Armor and shield bonuses to AC (including any enhancement bonuses to that armor) do not count against it because the weapon passes through armor. ( Dexterity, deflection, dodge, natural armor, and other such bonuses still apply.) A brilliant energy weapon cannot harm undead, constructs, or objects. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells gaseous form, continual flame; Cost +4 bonus
